source.title: Record-high parcel volume reflects China's economic vitality (China Daily)

extractions.claim: China's express delivery sector handled 199-216.5 billion parcels in 2025, up 11.5-13.7% YoY
extractions.evidence: China's parcel delivery sector set a new record in handling nearly 200 billion parcels in 2025, up 13.7% YoY. Revenue from express delivery services reached 1.5 trillion yuan ($215B). Mordor Intelligence reports 216.5 billion parcels for 2025, up 11.5%. In 2024, total volume was ~174.5 billion parcels.

verification.verifier_notes: Multiple sources give slightly different full-year 2025 figures (199B vs 216.5B), likely reflecting different counting methodologies or timing. Using ~200B as the baseline is reasonable.

extractions.claim: Pinduoduo surpassed Taobao/Tmall in parcel volume in 2023, becoming the largest platform contributor
extractions.evidence: When Pinduoduo's parcel volume surpassed that of Taobao/Tmall in 2023, Alibaba began repositioning parcel volume as a key performance metric.

verification.verifier_notes: This milestone is widely reported. PDD's low AOV (~RMB 40-50) means many more parcels per unit of GMV compared to JD or Tmall.

extractions.claim: Logistics back-calculation: If PDD handles ~35% of China's 200B parcels at RMB 40-50 AOV, domestic GMV = RMB 2.8-3.5T
extractions.evidence: E-commerce merchants generated 35.25% of 2025 parcel inflows. China handled ~200B parcels in 2025. PDD is the #1 platform by parcel volume. Pinduoduo's AOV is approximately RMB 40-50.

verification.verifier_notes: CALCULATION: If PDD generates ~35% of e-commerce parcels, and e-commerce is ~35% of total parcels, then PDD parcels = 0.35 * 200B * 0.35 = ~24.5B. At RMB 45 AOV = RMB 1.1T. BUT this understates because the 35% e-commerce share likely excludes platform-driven social commerce. Alternative: if PDD is the #1 platform and handles ~30-35% of ALL e-commerce parcels (not total parcels), and e-commerce parcels = ~130-140B (65% of 200B), then PDD = 39-49B parcels. At RMB 45 AOV = RMB 1.8-2.2T. PROBLEM: This is significantly below the RMB 4.5-4.8T analyst estimates, suggesting either: (a) AOV is higher than RMB 45 for basket-level orders, (b) PDD handles a larger share, or (c) multi-item orders generate fewer parcels than items purchased. Most likely: AOV measured per-order (multiple items) vs per-parcel diverge significantly. If average order contains 2-3 items shipped as one parcel, effective per-parcel GMV is RMB 90-135, yielding RMB 3.5-6.6T. This range brackets the analyst consensus.

extractions.claim: ZTO Express delivered 38.52 billion parcels in 2025, ranking #1 among logistics carriers for 9 consecutive years
extractions.evidence: ZTO Express delivered 38.52 billion parcels in 2025, ranking first in the industry for nine consecutive years.

verification.verifier_notes: ZTO handles ~19% of total market volume (38.5B / 200B). ZTO is known to be particularly strong in Pinduoduo-origin parcels.
